title: LE4 1BZ, Leicester City Council: environmental permit application advertisement - EPR/KP3490CH/V002
body: "Details of the application  The Environment Agency has received an application to vary an environmental permit under the Environmental Permitting (England and Wales) Regulations 2016 involving substantial change to a permit from Leicester City Council.  Application number EPR/KP3490CH/V002  Regulated facility type Substantial variation to a Hazardous Waste Transfer Station due to the addition of new EWC codes, some hazardous.  Extension to the permit boundary and variation of the layout of the site, with an increase in storage capacity. Annual throughput unchanged at upto 25,000 tonnes/annum  Regulated facility address   City HighwaysLeycroft RoadLeicesterLE4 1BZ   The application contains a description of how the proposed change(s) may affect:   the installation the materials, substances and energy it will use and generate the conditions of its site the source, nature and quantity of its foreseeable emissions and their significant effects on the environment the proposed techniques for preventing, reducing, and monitoring its emissions and preventing and recovering waste and an outline of the main alternatives, if any, considered   How to view and comment on the application  If you have any comments on the application send these by 04 August 2025.  You can comment:  Online: view and comment on the application using Citizen Space  Via email: pscpublicresponse@environment-agency.gov.uk  For advice about how to make a representation or if you are unable to make a representation via e-mail, please call 03708 506 506.  The Environment Agency will normally put any comments it receives on the public register. This includes your name but not your personal contact details. Please tell us if you do not want your response to be public.  The privacy notice for permit applicants/operators can be viewed at Privacy Notice  "
